title: TaskVerifyRequest
description: Payload for POST /tasks/{task_id}/verify — orchestrator reviews the result and triggers CBT minting.

orchestrator_id.description: agent_id of the orchestrator that submitted the original task.

quality_score.description: Subjective quality rating (0.0–1.0). Scores below 0.5 do not trigger CBT minting.

feedback.description: Optional human-readable feedback for the agent.
